chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Civil Revision Application No. 43 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES 1. For orders on CMA No.2156/2025 (U/A). 2. For orders on office objection a/w reply of counsel as at 'A'. 3. For orders on CMA No. 2157/2025 (Exemption). 4. For hearing of main case. 5. For orders on CMA No. 2158/2025 (Stay). 08.04.2025 Applicant Moin Ahmed in person..-.-.-.-.-. 1. Urgency granted 2–5. The Applicant appears in person and impugns the order dated 14.02.2025 whereby he has been aggrieved with the settlement of issues in Suit No.2102/2024 and most specifically he has been aggrieved with the issue No.4 which reads as follows: "4. Whether the suit of the Plaintiff is maintainable or not?” He has further stated that the suit is not maintainable and the issue has been wrongly framed. On query he has stated that he has filed an application for rejection of the plaint under Order VII Rule 11 CPC before the learned trial Court which is still pending. In view of what is stated above, I see no merits in the instant Civil Revision Application as the matter regarding maintainability of the suit can be taken up by the learned trial Court while deciding the application of the Applicant under Order VII Rule 11 CPC or at the time of final arguments of the main case. The instant Civil Revision Application merits no consideration and the same is hereby dismissed in limine along with listed applications. JUDGE Nadeem Qureshi “PA”
